content:
Modify the file `packages/daemon-core/src/recovery/RecoverySubsystem.ts` in project at D:\code\temp\SpecForge.

Read the file first. Then ensure it has these 4 methods fully implemented:
1. beginStartupPhase() - sets a startup flag
2. checkAndRepair() - reads WAL events, rebuilds state, checks consistency
3. reconnectOldSessions() - restores active sessions from event log
4. completeStartup() - marks daemon as ready

Also add a public isReady() getter.

Read the existing WAL.ts and StateManager.ts to understand how to call them.

After editing, run: npx tsc --noEmit --project packages/daemon-core/tsconfig.json

Write work log to specforge/archive/agent_runs/WI-001-sf-executor-10/work_log.md using sf_artifact_write.
